dimensions.name: Requirements Met
dimensions.gaps_to_10: All 14 explicit requirements verified PASS via direct checks. One minor gap: integration-report.md claims 'Max: GuidedSession.tsx @ 187 lines' but src/lib/vocabulary-seed.ts is 1117 lines and was included in the wc check command. The requirement says 'No component or hook file exceeds 200 lines' and vocabulary-seed.ts is a static data array (not a component/hook), so the requirement itself is technically satisfied — but the report's stated max is inaccurate about the full checked set.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.gaps_to_10: All API routes and data-fetching components have try/catch with user-facing error messages (verified via existing 207 passing tests including error scenario tests). ChangePinSection intentionally logs console.error on DB failure and surfaces 'Failed to save new PIN / 保存失败' to the user. No error handling was added or removed in this PR (test-only changes).

dimensions.name: UX Completeness
dimensions.gaps_to_10: Session route is fully functional (GuidedSession component, not a Coming Soon stub). 'Start Session' button links to /session which renders GuidedSession. Loading states present in prior tasks. No placeholder pages. Minor gap: end-to-end user journey (audio playback, activity completion) is not directly testable from static checks alone.

dimensions.name: Code Quality
dimensions.gaps_to_10: Test changes are minimal, targeted, and idiomatic. The flushTimers() helper in ParentPin.test.tsx is a clean extraction. All three test files use consistent act() wrapping patterns. vocabulary-seed.ts (1117 lines) is a pre-existing architectural concern not in scope for this PR. No unrelated code was touched.

dimensions.name: Test Coverage
dimensions.gaps_to_10: 207 tests across 25 suites, all passing. Zero act() warnings confirmed by direct test run. Error scenarios covered (wrong PIN, lockout, no PIN set, onboarding redirect). Both happy-path and failure-path PIN tests are present. Minor gap: no playwright/e2e tests for the full child journey.

dimensions.name: Security
dimensions.gaps_to_10: No hardcoded API keys (grep confirms). sessionStorage.setItem('parentAuthed', '1') is correctly gated behind verifyPIN() returning true. useParentAuth guards both /parent/dashboard and /parent/settings. PIN hash stored via crypto, not plaintext. Minor gap: sessionStorage is tab-scoped and clears on close — acceptable for a parent-PIN pattern on a shared-device kids app.

issues.description: The integration report states 'Max: GuidedSession.tsx @ 187 lines' for the component size check, but src/lib/vocabulary-seed.ts is 1117 lines and was included in the wc command that was run (wc -l src/lib/*.ts). The requirement says 'No component or hook file exceeds 200 lines' and vocabulary-seed.ts is a static data array, so the requirement is technically satisfied — but the report's claim about the maximum file size in the checked set is factually inaccurate.
issues.fix_guidance: Update integration-report.md to accurately state: 'Max component/hook/page: GuidedSession.tsx @ 187 lines. Note: src/lib/vocabulary-seed.ts is 1117 lines but is a static data seed array (not a component or hook), so the 200-line requirement is satisfied.' This is documentation accuracy only — no source code change needed.

summary: This PR makes targeted, correct fixes to three test files to eliminate 75 React act() warnings that were firing because async state updates (setTimeout-based PIN pad reset and useEffect-driven DB reads) occurred outside act() boundaries. All 14 explicit requirements from the task are verified PASS: 207/207 tests pass with zero act() warnings, TypeScript is error-free, FlipCard tap targets are 88px, no component/hook exceeds 200 lines, no hardcoded API keys, orphaned audio files are gone, all song/image assets are present, both parent pages use useParentAuth, the playwright config has no Desktop Chrome override, AudioManager resets this.error in both playWord and playWordEn, and the session route is a fully functional GuidedSession component. The only issue found is a P2 documentation inaccuracy: the integration report understates the maximum file size in the checked set (vocabulary-seed.ts is 1117 lines but is a data file, not a component). No P1 issues found. Verdict: PASS.
